name: selfhost
description: Runs the pipeline on its own project: authors the next unshipped prompt, verified clean-room
_model_note: Sonnet is the runtime target. Through the parity gate (M5) run an Opus orchestrator instead, as the external judge (usage §A1 Step 6, workflow §7); switch back to Sonnet after parity clears.
_scope_note: Lean context — steering only, role prompts lazy-loaded from disk on demand. Workspace root _self/, deliverable target code-canon/agentic-delivery-pipeline.md (ADR-0021). Reuses the generic step.json executor unchanged.
